title: Security Operations Fundamental
description: A structured breakdown of what makes a high-quality security alert, how to classify outcomes (TP/FP/NMI/FN), the SOC analyst mindset, the full 8-step detection-to-feedback workflow, and a real-world impossible travel case study.

title: Network Security Monitoring (NSM)
description: A deep dive into NSM fundamentals — the three types of network evidence, Zeek log analysis, and pro-level detection techniques for beaconing, DNS tunneling, DGA hunting, and JA3 fingerprinting.

title: PCAP & TCP Conversation Analysis
description: A deep dive into packet captures as the gold standard of network forensics — what they reveal, what they hide, the anatomy of a TCP/TLS conversation, and how to spot C2 beaconing patterns hidden inside seemingly benign traffic.

title: Phishing & Malware Detection
description: A practical walkthrough of phishing mechanics, email header authentication, and real-world case analysis — two live phishing emails dissected end-to-end using SPF/DKIM/DMARC triage, VirusTotal, and malicious URL decomposition.
